code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut current = ""
    mut has = false
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if has
            match string.parse_int(current)
            when Some(v)
              let doubled = v * 2
              if string.is_empty(result)
                result = "#{doubled}"
              else
                result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
              end
            when None
              ()
            end
            current = ""
            has = false
          end
        else
          current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
          has = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if has
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        let doubled = v * 2
        if string.is_empty(result)
          result = "#{doubled}"
        else
          result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
